notes: Only combat-oriented consumables are assigned IDs.
Scrolls and Technicks are not treated as item-use entries.
Sam.py checks the linked character inventory before applying or consuming an item.

id_index.name: Potion
id_index.description: Restores 120 HP and removes 1 wound; amount increases with Potion Lore.

id_index.name: Hi-Potion
id_index.description: Restores 450 HP; amount increases with Potion Lore.

id_index.name: X-Potion
id_index.description: Restores 1,500 HP and clears all wounds; amount increases with Potion Lore.

id_index.name: Ether
id_index.description: Restores 50 MP; amount increases with Ether Lore.

id_index.name: Hi-Ether
id_index.description: Restores 200 MP; amount increases with Ether Lore.

id_index.name: Elixir
id_index.description: Completely restores HP and MP.

id_index.name: Megalixir
id_index.description: Completely restores HP and MP of the party within a given radius.

id_index.name: Phoenix Down
id_index.description: Revives a character; HP restored increases with Phoenix Lore.

id_index.name: Black Phoenix Feather
id_index.description: Revives a character at Full HP and regrows missing limbs, Inflicts Berserk & Bubble Will ALWAYS trigger a boss fight; A Black Phoenix feather with a transparent black mist emitting from it

id_index.name: Rainbow Phoenix Feather
id_index.description: Revives a character, 4m Timer is ignored.

id_index.name: Antidote
id_index.description: Removes Poison.

id_index.name: Eye Drops
id_index.description: Removes Blind.

id_index.name: Echo Herbs
id_index.description: Removes Silence.

id_index.name: Gold Needle
id_index.description: Removes Petrify and Stone.

id_index.name: Prince's Kiss
id_index.description: Removes Sleep.

id_index.name: Chronos Tear
id_index.description: Removes Stop and Slow.

id_index.name: Handkerchief
id_index.description: Removes Oil.

id_index.name: Remedy
id_index.description: Removes Poison, Slow, Blind, and Silence; more with Remedy Lore.

id_index.name: Vaccine
id_index.description: Removes Disease.

id_index.name: Serum
id_index.description: Removes Disease.

id_index.name: Diablos Stabilizer
id_index.description: A rare stabilizing agent that suppresses the Curse of Diablos but does not fully remove it.

id_index.name: Librascope
id_index.description: Automatically performs a full Libra II scan, revealing advanced statistics, affinities, abilities, traits, and Chaos-obscured data. Consumed on use.

id_index.name: Aero Mote
id_index.description: Deals wind-aspected mote damage to one target.

id_index.name: Aeroga Mote
id_index.description: A mote containing the power of Aeroga. Deals wind damage to all foes in range and ignores Reflect.

id_index.name: Aquara Mote
id_index.description: A mote containing the power of Water. Deals water damage to all foes in range and ignores Reflect.

id_index.name: Bacchus's Wine
id_index.description: Inflicts Berserk on one target.

id_index.name: Balance Mote
id_index.description: A mote containing the power of Balance. Casts Balance on all foes in range and ignores Reflect.

id_index.name: Baltoro Seed
id_index.description: Grants Protect, Shell, Haste, Bravery, Faith, Invisible, Regen, Float, Bubble, and Libra to one target.

id_index.name: Bio Mote
id_index.description: A mote containing the power of Sap. Inflicts Sap and deals non-elemental damage to all foes in range, ignoring Reflect.

id_index.name: Blue Herb
id_index.description: Haults Poison.

id_index.name: Bubble Mote
id_index.description: A mote containing the power of Bubble. Grants Bubble to a single target and ignores Reflect.

id_index.name: Cura Mote
id_index.description: A mote containing the power of Cura. Restores HP to all allies in range and ignores Reflect.

id_index.name: Dark Energy
id_index.description: Deals massive non-elemental damage to all enemies in range.

id_index.name: Dark Matter
id_index.description: Deals damage to all foes in range. Its damage scales with the number of Knots of Rust used.

id_index.name: Dark Mote
id_index.description: Deals dark-aspected mote damage to one target.

id_index.name: Dispel Mote
id_index.description: Casts Dispel when used.

id_index.name: Domaine Calvados
id_index.description: Grants Bravery to one target.

id_index.name: Float Mote
id_index.description: A mote containing the power of Float. Grants Float to all targets in range and ignores Reflect.

id_index.name: Gravity Mote
id_index.description: Deals damage to all foes in range. Deals non-elemental damage equal to a portion of each target’s maximum HP and ignores Reflect.

id_index.name: Green Herb
id_index.description: heals a small amount of health

id_index.name: Hastega Mote
id_index.description: A mote containing the power of Hastega. Grants Haste to all allies in range and ignores Reflect.

id_index.name: Holy Mote
id_index.description: A mote containing the power of Holy. Deals holy damage to one foe and ignores Reflect.

id_index.name: Hypo Spray
id_index.description: Restores 800 HP and removes 1 wound; Hypo sprays deliver stimulants, analgesics and active neuro-biological reinforcing elements through a sub-dermal injector. The solution takes time to act on the body: further trauma while it is active reduce the hypo's maximum healing potential. Even a few hits will cancel the effect altogether.

id_index.name: Knot of Rust
id_index.description: Deals random non-elemental damage to one foe.

id_index.name: Lightning Fang
id_index.description: Deals Lightning-element damage to one foe.

id_index.name: Meteorite (A)
id_index.description: My hopes rose, but 'twas naught but an ordinary stone. Inflicts Sap on one enemy.

id_index.name: Meteorite (B)
id_index.description: A chondrite, a species of meteorite found in plenty. Inflicts Disease on one enemy.

id_index.name: Meteorite (C)
id_index.description: A malleable specimen, teeming with fine veins of iron withal. Deals random physical damage to one target based on the user’s maximum HP.

id_index.name: Meteorite (D)
id_index.description: At last, the elusive achondrite is mine! The Widmanstatten pattern is simply stunning! Deals powerful random physical damage to one target.

id_index.name: Nu Khai Sand
id_index.description: Removes Confuse.

id_index.name: Overture MK II
id_index.description: A master-crafted evolution of Overture, imbued with Ice Magicite. Its blade leaves spectral afterimages that repeat successful strikes moments later.

id_index.name: Reflectga Mote
id_index.description: Casts Reflectga when used.

id_index.name: Reverse Mote
id_index.description: A mote containing the power of Reverse. Grants Reverse to a single target and ignores Reflect.

id_index.name: Rime Fang
id_index.description: Deals Ice-element damage to one foe.

id_index.name: Scathe Mote
id_index.description: A mote containing the power of Scathe. Casts Scathe on all foes in range and ignores Reflect.

id_index.name: Shock Mote
id_index.description: A mote containing the power of Shock. Deals heavy non-elemental damage to all foes in range and ignores Reflect.

id_index.name: Soleil Fang
id_index.description: Deals Fire-element damage to one foe.

id_index.name: Vanishga Mote
id_index.description: A mote containing the power of Vanishga. Grants Invisible to all allies in range and ignores Reflect.

id_index.name: Vyrrah’s Lament
id_index.description: The Spear of the Breaking Dawn — a soul-locked divine spear born when Lumina Farron refused erasure during Father Farron’s Final Ascension Ritual. It is the shape of her refusal, her will made manifest.

id_index.name: Warp Mote
id_index.description: Attempts to displace a target with unstable space magick.

id_index.name: Water Mote
id_index.description: Deals water-aspected mote damage to one target.
